Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS-COMPLAINANT NIBBI INVESTMENTS' DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is Off calendar. Case settled. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Set For Trial On Aug-13-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Of Pltf'S Complaint And To Set Aside The Default, And Default Judgment If Any Taken Against Her On The X-Complaint In This Action
Off Calendar Dec-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. WILLIAM E. GILG, TEL. NO. (650) 871-8647 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CHRISTINA N. DOBIS OF ZANGHI TORRES ARSHAWSKY LLP, TEL. NO. 977-0444 EXT. 25 APPEARING FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT NIBBI INVESTMENT;
ATTY. IRENE TAKAHASKI OF LEWIS BRISBOIS & SMITH, TEL. NO. 438-6605 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT NIBBI INVESTMENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF MICHELLE BERNAL'S Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Of Plaintiff'S Complaint And To Set Aside The Default, And Default Judgment If Any Taken Against Her On The Cross-Complaint In This Action IS Granted. Plaintiff has shown she is entitled to relief under CCP 473(b). Plaintiff must pay the balance due on the initial filing fee today. Request for sanctions and attorneys fee was denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: La Vena Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/MM
